contentBlocks.original:
आपो हि ष्ठा मयोभुवस्था न ऊर्जे दधातन ।
म॒हे रणा॑य॒ चक्ष॑से ॥१॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āpo hi ṣṭhā mayobhuvasthā na ūrje dadhātana .
mahe raṇāya cakṣase ..1..
contentBlocks.translation: Waters, you truly are sources of happiness; bestow upon us vitality, great delight, and clear perception.
contentBlocks.meanings: आपः (āpaḥ) – waters; हि (hi) – indeed; ष्ठा (ṣṭhā) – present; मयोभुवः (mayobhuvaḥ) – source of joy (mayaḥ:joy | bhuvaḥ:source of); स्था (sthā) – remain; न (na) – not; ऊर्जे (ūrje) – for strength; दधातन (dadhātana) – impart; महे (mahe) – great; रणाय (raṇāya) – for battle (raṇa:battle | atha:for); चक्षसे (cakṣase) – for vision;

contentBlocks.original:
यो वः शिवतमो रसस्तस्य भाजयतेह नः ।
उशतीरिव मातरः ॥२॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yo vaḥ śivatamo rasastasya bhājayateha naḥ .
uśatīriva mātaraḥ ..2..
contentBlocks.translation: O Waters, may you share with us that most auspicious essence of yours, like loving mothers (sharing their best with their children).
contentBlocks.meanings: यः (yaḥ) – who; वः (vaḥ) – your; शिवतमः (śivatamaḥ) – most auspicious; रसः (rasaḥ) – sap; तस्य (tasya) – of that; भाजयते (bhājayate) – shares; इह (iha) – here; नः (naḥ) – with us; उशतीः (uśatīḥ) – desiring; इव (iva) – like; मातरः (mātaraḥ) – mothers;

contentBlocks.original:
तस्मा अरं गमाम वो यस्य क्षयाय जिन्वथ ।
आपो जनयथा च नः ॥३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
tasmā araṃ gamāma vo yasya kṣayāya jinvatha .
āpo janayathā ca naḥ ..3..
contentBlocks.translation: O Waters, we approach you for that (essence) by which you invigorate those who dwell (on earth). O Waters, you give birth to us (i.e., sustain our lives).
contentBlocks.meanings: तस्मा (tasmā) – therefore; अरं (araṃ) – quickly; गमाम (gamāma) – we go; वः (vaḥ) – to you; यस्य (yasya) – whose; क्षयाय (kṣayāya) – for destruction; जिन्वथ (jinvatha) – you invigorate; आपः (āpaḥ) – waters; जनयथा (janayathā) – you generate; च (ca) – and; नः (naḥ) – us;

contentBlocks.original:
शं नो देवीरभिष्टय आपो भवन्तु पीतये ।
शं योरभि स्रवन्तु नः ॥४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śaṃ no devīrabhiṣṭaya āpo bhavantu pītaye .
śaṃ yorabhi sravantu naḥ ..4..
contentBlocks.translation: May you divine Waters bring us peace and well-being for drinking. May the auspiciousness that flows in you, flow into us.
contentBlocks.meanings: शं (śam) – auspiciousness; नः (naḥ) – to us; देवीः (devīḥ) – goddesses; अभिष्टय (abhiṣṭaya) – wished for; आपः (āpaḥ) – waters; भवन्तु (bhavantu) – may be; पीतये (pītaye) – for drinking; शं (śam) – auspiciousness; यः (yaḥ) – which; अभि (abhi) – towards; स्रवन्तु (sravantu) – may flow; नः (naḥ) – to us;

contentBlocks.original:
ईशाना वार्याणां क्षयन्तीश्चर्षणीनाम् ।
अपो याचामि भेषजम् ॥५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
īśānā vāryāṇāṃ kṣayantīścarṣaṇīnām .
apo yācāmi bheṣajam ..5..
contentBlocks.translation: O Waters, you are the rulers of precious treasures and sovereigns over people. I ask of you the healing remedy.
contentBlocks.meanings: ईशाना (īśānā) – divinity; वार्याणां (vāryāṇām) – of waters; क्षयन्ती (kṣayantī) – dwelling; ईश्चर्षणीनाम् (īścarṣaṇīnām) – in the farm lands (īś:in | carṣaṇīnām:farm lands); अपः (apaḥ) – waters; याचामि (yācāmi) – I implore; भेषजम् (bheṣajam) – nutrition;

contentBlocks.original:
अप्सु मे सोमो अब्रवीदन्तर्विश्वानि भेषजा ।
अग्नि च विश्वशंभुवम् ॥६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
apsu me somo abravīdantarviśvāni bheṣajā .
agni ca viśvaśaṃbhuvam ..6..
contentBlocks.translation: Soma told me that within the Waters dwell all healing herbs, and also Agni (fire) who brings universal well-being.
contentBlocks.meanings: अप्सु (apsu) – in the waters; मे (me) – to me; सोमः (somaḥ) – Soma; अब्रवीत् (abravīt) – said; अन्तः (antaḥ) – inside; विश्वानि (viśvāni) – all; भेषजाः (bheṣajāḥ) – medicinal herbs; अग्निः (agniḥ) – fire; च (ca) – and; विश्वशंभुवम् (viśvaśaṃbhuvam) – brings auspiciousness to the world (viśva:world | śaṃbhuvam:brings auspiciousness);

contentBlocks.original:
आपः पृणीत भेषजं वरूथं तन्वेऽ मम ।
ज्योक्च सूर्यं दृशे ॥७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āpaḥ pṛṇīta bheṣajaṃ varūthaṃ tanve' mama .
jyokca sūryaṃ dṛśe ..7..
contentBlocks.translation: O Waters, filled abundantly with healing herbs, be a protection for my body, so that I may behold the sun for long (live long).
contentBlocks.meanings: आपः (āpaḥ) – waters; पृणीत (pṛṇīta) – fill; भेषजं (bheṣajam) – medicine; वरूथं (varūtham) – protection; तन्वे (tanve) – for the body; मम (mama) – my; ज्योक् (jyok) – long; च (ca) – and; सूर्यं (sūryam) – sun; दृशे (dṛśe) – to see;

contentBlocks.original:
इदमापः प्र वहत यत्किं च दुरितं मयि ।
यद्वाहमभिदुद्रोह यद्वा शेप उतानृतम् ॥८॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
idamāpaḥ pra vahata yatkiṃ ca duritaṃ mayi .
yadvāhamabhidudroha yadvā śepa utānṛtam ..8..
contentBlocks.translation: O Waters, wash away from me whatever evil (tendency) is in me, whatever wrong I have committed, whatever curse (I have uttered), or whatever falsehood (I have spoken).
contentBlocks.meanings: इदम् (idam) – this; आपः (āpaḥ) – waters; प्र (pra) – forth; वहत (vahata) – carry; यत्किं (yatkiṃ) – whatever (yat:whatever | kim:what); च (ca) – and; दुरितं (duritaṃ) – wickedness; मयि (mayi) – in me; यद्वा (yadvā) – or whatever (yat:whatever | vā:or); अहम् (aham) – I; अभिदुद्रोह (abhidudroha) – treacheries; यद्वा (yadvā) – or whatever (yat:whatever | vā:or); शेप (śepa) – falsehood; उत (uta) – and; अनृतम् (anṛtam) – untruth;

contentBlocks.original:
आपो अद्यान्वचारिषं रसेन समगस्महि ।
पयस्वानग्न आ गहि तं मा सं सृज वर्चसा ॥९॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āpo adyānvacāriṣaṃ rasena samagasmahi .
payasvānagna ā gahi taṃ mā saṃ sṛja varcasā ..9..
contentBlocks.translation: O Waters, today I have come to you; may I merge with your essence. O Waters filled with nourishment, rich with Agni (vitality), come to me—unite me with luster and vigor.
contentBlocks.meanings: आपः (āpaḥ) – waters; अद्य (adya) – today; अन्वचारिषं (anvacāriṣaṃ) – I came; रसेन (rasena) – with rasa; समगस्महि (samagasmahi) – we deeply enter; पयस्वान् (payasvān) – endowed with milk; अग्ने (agne) – O Agni; आ (ā) – come; गहि (gahi) – enter; तं (taṃ) – that; माम् (mām) – me; सं सृज (saṃ sṛja) – produce; वर्चसा (varcasā) – with lustre;
